goals: Help Divyansh with any task — coding, system fixes, research, automation
Execute multi-step tasks fully without forgetting progress
Remember context and personal facts across sessions
Solve recurring problems once and remember the solution

scheduled.prompt: Run a quick system health check: cpu usage, ram, disk space. If anything is critical (cpu >90%, disk >85%), take note and report. Otherwise just log that all is well.
Check for any active unfinished tasks in the task list. If there are tasks that haven't been worked on recently, continue executing them step by step.
